description: The HR manager needs to process the bi-weekly payroll for all hotel employees.

nodes.task_description: Import all employee timesheet data for the pay period.

expected_outcome.value: All hours worked are successfully imported into the payroll system.

nodes.task_description: Calculate gross wages, deductions (taxes, benefits), and net pay for each employee.

expected_outcome.value: The system accurately calculates all payroll figures.

nodes.task_description: Submit the payroll for processing (direct deposits and checks).

expected_outcome.value: The payroll is submitted to the bank for payment.
